title: Product Owner

experiences.description: Delivered measurable work in product / business analysis using Roadmap, Jira, A/B Testing, Confluence. Collaborated with product, engineering and operations teams to improve delivery quality.

Worked with cross-functional stakeholders and documented repeatable workflows
